title: StamCoin
description: StamCoin is a currency mod for Stam1o's Private SMP server made to add a way for players to buy and sell Goods via quests that are given out by a Quest giver
body:
StamCoin – Currency Mod for Minecraft

Step into a more immersive Minecraft economy with StamCoin, a custom-made currency in a classic pixel-art style to match the Minecraft aesthetic.

Whether you're running a kingdom, managing a trading post, or setting up an RPG server, StamCoin adds depth and realism to player interactions and commerce. Use coins to buy, sell, trade, or even hoard your wealth.

Features:

Custom currency item: StamCoin

Seamless integration into survival, creative, or custom modpacks

Ideal for multiplayer economies, shops, quests, and server RPG mechanics

Fully Minecraft-styled Coins
